steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The task is to introduce Clara Hayes to a new audience. An introduction must tell readers who Clara Hayes is — her identity. The notes identify her as a British violinist and former owner of a Stradivarius.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — Of the 1,000 or so violins Antonio Stradivari made, only about 500 exist today.: This is about Stradivari, not Clara Hayes. Clara Hayes is not even named. ✗
  • Choice B — Clara Hayes was a British violinist who once owned a Stradivarius violin.: Names Clara Hayes, tells us who she was (British violinist), and adds a relevant fact (she owned a Stradivarius). A complete introduction. ✓
  • Choice C — The Clara Hayes Stradivarius is named after Clara Hayes.: Mentions Clara Hayes by name but gives no information about who she was — readers still don't know anything about her. ✗
  • Choice D — Born in 1644, Antonio Stradivari was an Italian instrument maker whose violins are famous for their quality.: This is entirely about Stradivari. Clara Hayes is absent. ✗
That is the correct answer.
